calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-03-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:36am

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Howard Leonhardt, appears in pro per. Respondent, The Sutton Law Firm, appears through Jim Sutton.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.

9:57 am
Matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-12-2010 Judgment Entered
